data.title: Mantra launches first real-time dashboard showing OM token supply details and more
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Mantra announced that the initial version of the first real-time dashboard has been launched. The dashboard is designed to provide a clear perspective and real-time data to show the supply of OM tokens, operating wallets, and other important on-chain asset holdings.
Dashboard V1 includes: a detailed disassembly of the EVM chain and the mainnet OM; links to relevant wallets.

data.title: SkyAI announced that its public pre-sale will not retain any tokens or BNB earnings. Its pre-sale hard cap is 500 BNB, and it was eventually oversubscribed 167 times
A whale who went long on HYPE with 7.5 million USDC margin 3 times has made a floating profit of more than 5 million US dollars
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Yujin monitoring, a whale who used 7.5 million USDC as margin to go long on HYPE 3 times has now made a floating profit of 5.07 million US dollars. The average opening price of his long HYPE position on Hyperliquid since April 8 was 11.93 US dollars, while HYPE is now priced at 17.89 US dollars.

data.title: Bitcoin gains momentum as China’s M2 supply hits record 326 trillion Yuan
data.description:
China M2 supply hit a new high of 326T Yuan ($44. 7T) at the end of the first quarter, sparking speculation that Bitcoin might soon surge in value.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bitcoin-momentum-m2-supply-326/

data.title: Cryptocurrency Funding Rates Indicate Neutral Market Sentiment
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, data from Coinglass reveals that current funding rates on major centralized and decentralized exchanges suggest a neutral market sentiment. The rates do not indicate a widespread bearish or bullish outlook.

Funding rates are fees set by cryptocurrency trading platforms to maintain the balance between contract prices and the prices of underlying assets, typically applied to perpetual contracts. This mechanism facilitates the exchange of funds between long and short traders, without the platform charging this fee. It adjusts the cost or yield of holding contracts to keep contract prices close to the asset prices.

A funding rate of 0.01% signifies a baseline rate. When the rate exceeds 0.01%, it indicates a generally bullish market sentiment. Conversely, a rate below 0.005% suggests a bearish outlook.

data.title: GMT Experiences Significant Surge in Value
data.description: According to Odaily, market data indicates that GMT has surged past 0.06 USDT, currently trading at 0.059 USDT. The cryptocurrency has experienced a nearly 20% increase over the past 24 hours.

data.title: BNB Drops Below 590 USDT with a 0.24% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 19, 2025, 12:17 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 590 USDT and is now trading at 589.950012 USDT, with a narrowed 0.24% decrease in 24 hours.
